---
title: 'FingerHut Data Manipulation'
author: 'Charlie Kopp'
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    fig-align: center
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false

---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
```

# Feature Engineering

```{r}

```

# Flatten Data

```{r}

```

# Save sample

```{r}

```
